home_meta_title: Better Life by Zenyth — wellness across the pillars that matter
home_meta_description: Evidence-based content, screening tests, and personalized recommendations for sleep, body, and mind.
home_hero_title: Live better, across the pillars that matter.
home_hero_subtitle: We start with sleep through Somnium and grow step by step: evidence-based content and tools that help you understand and change.
home_featured_subtitle: The latest articles from live pillars.
home_quiz_invitation_body: Take the Somnium sleep test. 5 questions, 30 seconds, and you get your profile with recommendations.
footer_disclaimer: Better Life provides educational information about lifestyle and wellbeing. The content is not medical advice and does not replace consulting a professional.
pillar_coming_soon_body: This pillar will be available soon.
screening_meta_title: Sleep test — What keeps you awake? · Somnium
screening_meta_description: A short screening test that shows your sleep pattern and recommendations you can apply tonight.
screening_tip_title: One thing you can do tonight
capture_title: Get your full profile by email
capture_subtitle: We'll send your profile and recommendations so you have them handy.
capture_consent_results: I want to receive my profile and its recommendations by email.
capture_consent_results_required: Required to receive your results by email.
capture_consent_marketing: I'd like to occasionally receive tips and news from Better Life. I can unsubscribe anytime.
capture_privacy_note: We respect your data and never use it for purposes you didn't tick.
capture_consent_required: Tick consent for results delivery to continue.
capture_success_body: We've sent your sleep profile and recommendations. If you can't find it, check your spam folder.
capture_error: Something went wrong sending it. Please try again.
newsletter_title: Get the best ideas on wellbeing
newsletter_subtitle: An occasional email, no noise. Just useful things about sleep, body, and mind.
newsletter_consent: I agree to receive the Better Life newsletter with tips and news. I can unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter_consent_required: Tick consent so you can subscribe.
newsletter_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
email_profile_intro: Based on your answers, here's your sleep profile and a few recommendations you can apply tonight.
email_profile_footer: This email is educational and is not medical advice.
disclaimer_screening: This test is for educational and orientation purposes. It is not a diagnostic tool and does not replace consulting a doctor.
disclaimer_result: The result is guidance based on your answers, not a medical diagnosis. For persistent issues, consult a specialist.
error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
not_found_body: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist.
hiw_intro: A simple, three-step path across any of the pillars that matter to you.
hiw_step1_body: Start with a short screening test. It shows your pattern, no jargon.
hiw_step2_body: You get a clear profile and evidence-based content, so you understand what's happening and why.
hiw_step3_body: Concrete recommendations you can apply today, step by step.
claim_body: We've kept your profile safe. Soon you'll be able to claim it when you create an account.
claim_no_token: Invalid or expired link. You can retake the test anytime.
shop_subtitle: Products chosen for better sleep, organized by the problem they solve.
product_why_body: Based on your sleep profile, this product is a good match for you.
wishlist_empty: You haven't saved any products yet.
wishlist_login_prompt: Sign in or take the sleep quiz to save products.
account_profile_none: Take the sleep quiz for personalized recommendations.
account_no_addresses: You don't have any saved addresses yet.
reviews_none: No reviews for this product yet.
reviews_pending: Thanks! Your review will appear after moderation.
reviews_error: Your review couldn't be submitted. Please try again.
reviews_verified_note: Only verified buyers can leave a review.
checkout_empty: Your cart is empty. Add products before checking out.
checkout_error: The order could not be completed. Check your details and try again.
checkout_payment_note: Payment is simulated at this stage (Stripe and Netopia activate with their keys).
order_confirmed_body: Thank you! Your order #{number} has been placed. You'll receive a confirmation email.
account_register_error: The account could not be created. The email may already be in use.
cookie_body: We use necessary cookies to run the site and, with your consent, analytics and marketing cookies.
